span.p:
NAVIGATING / ASCENDING / DESCENDING
STOP_NOW or recoverable fault

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Manual resume only
resume_context と状態別前提条件を再検証

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Return target
NAVIGATING / ascent or descent preflight

span.p:
Run-authorized fallback
fresh geometry + valid leases → DESCENT_PREFLIGHT

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Any armed mission state
critical fault or recovery deadline failure
